meta.title: TiDB Cloud Startup Program: Get $100k Credits
meta.description: Join the TiDB Cloud Startup Program to launch fast and scale without limits. Apply today to receive $100,000 in free cloud credits for your database needs.

sections.headline: Launch Fast. Scale without Limits.
sections.subheadline: Get $100,000 in TiDB Cloud credits to build your next generation application on the world's most advanced open-source distributed database.

items.label: In Cloud Credits
items.description: Free credits to power your development and production workloads.

items.label: Uptime SLA
items.description: Enterprise-grade reliability without the enterprise price tag.

items.label: Faster Scaling
items.description: Instantly scale storage and compute as your user base grows.

items.label: Security & Compliance
items.description: Built-in encryption, audit logs, and compliance certifications.

sections.title: Everything You Need to Succeed
sections.subtitle: Our startup program provides more than just credits. We give you the tools and support to win.

items.title: Serverless Architecture
items.description: Separate storage and compute to optimize costs and handle unpredictable traffic spikes effortlessly.

items.title: MySQL Compatible
items.description: Drop-in compatibility with MySQL means you can migrate your existing apps with zero code changes.

items.title: Global Distribution
items.description: Deploy across multiple regions with a single click to serve your users with low latency worldwide.

items.title: HTAP Capabilities
items.description: Run real-time analytics and transactional workloads on the same data without complex ETL pipelines.

items.quote: The $100k credits from the TiDB Cloud Startup Program allowed us to scale our user base from 10k to 1M without worrying about database costs or performance bottlenecks.
items.author: Sarah Chen, CTO at DataScale

items.quote: Migrating to TiDB Cloud was seamless. The serverless architecture means we only pay for what we use, which is perfect for our variable traffic patterns.
items.author: Marcus Johnson, Founder at TechFlow

items.q: Who is eligible for the TiDB Cloud Startup Program?
items.a: The program is open to early-stage startups, typically those that are less than 5 years old, have less than $10M in funding, and are building cloud-native applications.

items.q: How long are the credits valid?
items.a: Credits are typically valid for 12 months from the date of approval, giving you ample time to grow your infrastructure.

items.q: Do I need to provide financial information to apply?
items.a: No, we do not require financial statements for the initial application. We focus on your product, team, and growth potential.

items.q: Can I use the credits on the Serverless tier?
items.a: Yes, the credits apply to all TiDB Cloud Serverless and Dedicated tiers, allowing you to choose the architecture that best fits your needs.

sections.title: Ready to Scale Your Startup?
sections.subtitle: Join the TiDB Cloud Startup Program today and unlock $100,000 in credits to power your growth.
